title: Sampling, Inference, Regression, and Causal Limits · Quantity Clinic: Confidence Intervals
summary: Evaluate a program change from sampled observational and experimental evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int confidence intervals increment in an inference and limitations brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Construct and interpret confidence intervals without probability misstatements.
Explain sampling variability through simulated sampling distributions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
